channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Reports say Trump adopts a hardline stance amid growing Republican Senate resistance to key policy initiatives
item.description: According to reporting cited from The Washington Post and summarized by Raw Story, President Donald Trump is facing increasing resistance from Senate Republicans over several of his policy priorities ...

item.title: Actor James Hardy Killed in Stabbing Outside Tarzana Home; Suspect Arrested
item.description: Veteran actor James Hardy, 81, was found dead with a stab wound to the chest outside a residence in the Tarzana neighborhood of Los Angeles on the morning of June 3, 2026, according to police. Authori...

item.title: Internal CBS Dispute Grows After Leadership Changes at '60 Minutes'
item.description: CBS News president Bari Weiss is facing increasing internal criticism following a controversial restructuring of the long-running news program '60 Minutes.' According to a report cited by Raw Story, o...

item.title: White House Plans UFC Event for Trump's 80th Birthday Amid Declining Support Among Young Men
item.description: The White House is organizing a major Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC) event on the South Lawn as part of President Donald Trump's 80th birthday celebrations on June 14, 2026. The spectacle, dubbe...

item.title: Ariana Grande Thanks Fans for Support of 'Hate That I Made You Love Me' Ahead of New Album Release
item.description: Ariana Grande has expressed her appreciation to fans following the strong reception of her new single, 'Hate That I Made You Love Me.' The singer shared a message on Instagram in which she said she wa...

item.title: SpaceX Targets $1.77 Trillion Valuation in Planned IPO While Remaining Unprofitable
item.description: SpaceX has announced plans for a landmark initial public offering that could value the company at approximately $1.77 trillion, potentially making it the largest IPO in history. According to the filin...

item.title: Trump Personally Lobbies Republicans to Support Permanent Daylight Saving Time
item.description: President Donald Trump has made permanent daylight saving time an unusually high-profile legislative priority and is actively lobbying Republican lawmakers to support the Sunshine Protection Act. Acco...

item.title: Federal Judge Questions DOJ Arguments in Lawsuit Challenging Proposed Trump Gold Coin
item.description: A federal court hearing in Oregon focused on a legal challenge to a proposed 24-karat gold commemorative coin featuring President Donald Trump's likeness. The lawsuit was filed by retired Portland att...

item.title: Senate Republicans Block Key FISA Extension Amid Opposition to Trump's DNI Nomination
item.description: On June 5, 2026, Senate Republicans delivered a significant setback to President Donald Trump by failing to advance a bill extending the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA). The legislation, ...

item.title: Report Examines Dark-Money Funding for Conservative Groups That Supported Supreme Court Challenge to Voting Rights Act Protections
item.description: A new analysis by the progressive watchdog organization True North Research found that seven conservative nonprofit groups involved in the Supreme Court case Louisiana v. Callais received nearly $105 ...

item.title: Yacht Club Games Says Many Players Are Missing Large Portions of Mina The Hollower's Hidden Content
item.description: Yacht Club Games has revealed that players may still have a great deal left to discover in Mina The Hollower, despite the game's strong launch and extensive community exploration. In an interview with...

item.title: CBS Replacement for Stephen Colbert Draws Significantly Lower Ratings as Rivals Gain Viewers
item.description: New audience data indicate that CBS's late-night programming experienced a substantial decline in viewership following the departure of Stephen Colbert from 'The Late Show.' According to figures cited...

item.title: NASA Ends MAVEN Mission After Loss of Contact With Mars Orbiter Following 11 Years of Scientific Operations
item.description: NASA has officially ended efforts to recover the MAVEN (Mars Atmosphere and Volatile Evolution) spacecraft after losing contact with it in December 2025. The spacecraft, which had been operating succe...

item.title: Opinion Column Praises Scott Pelley for Resisting Alleged Political Pressure on CBS News
item.description: In this opinion piece, commentator Thom Hartmann argues that independent journalism is under increasing pressure in the United States and presents veteran journalist Scott Pelley as a prominent exampl...

item.title: Vintage Photographs Celebrate the Beauty and Legacy of Actress Ella Raines
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday highlights the life, career, and enduring appeal of American actress Ella Raines (1920–1988), one of the notable yet often overlooked stars of Hollywood’s Golden Age...

item.title: Rob Lowe and Melissa Gilbert’s Six-Year Relationship: Love, Fame, and Heartbreak in the 1980s
item.description: The article looks back at the highly publicized relationship between actors Rob Lowe and Melissa Gilbert, who dated on and off from 1981 to 1987. Both were only 17 years old when their romance began. ...

item.title: Practical Tips for Meeting Daily Protein Goals Through Everyday Foods and Meal Prep
item.description: The article discusses strategies for increasing daily protein consumption to support health, weight management, muscle building, and overall wellness. According to health authorities like the NIH, the...

item.title: LEGO Unveils 12,060-Piece Sagrada Familia Set to Commemorate the 100th Anniversary of Gaudí’s Death
item.description: LEGO has announced the LEGO Architecture Sagrada Familia (21065), a massive 12,060-piece model that becomes the largest building set ever released by the company. The launch coincides with the centena...

item.title: Amazon and MGM to Publish Future James Bond Games Following the Success of 007 First Light
item.description: Amazon will take a larger role in the publication of future James Bond video games after the release of 007 First Light. According to Jeff Gattis, General Manager of Gaming at Amazon, the company did ...

item.title: Frequent White Supremacist Candidate Files for Illinois Governor Race After Multiple Unsuccessful Campaigns
item.description: Richard Mayers, a political candidate with a long history of promoting white supremacist and racist views, has filed paperwork to run for governor of Illinois. According to reports cited in the articl...
